Square Footage Calculator

Calculate the square footage of any rectangular space. Enter length and width to get the area in square feet or square meters.

FAQ

How do I calculate square footage?

Square footage = Length × Width. For example, a 12ft × 15ft room = 180 square feet.

How do I convert square feet to square meters?

Multiply square feet by 0.0929. For example, 200 sq ft × 0.0929 = 18.58 sq m.

How do I calculate irregular shapes?

Break the area into rectangles, calculate each one separately, then add them together.
